en.name: Avalo Pizarro
en.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 1 of your [Fullalead] cards: If your Leader has the {Blackbeard Pirates} type, this Character gains +4000 power during this turn.[On K.O.] Draw 1 card.

jp.name: アバロ・ピサロ
jp.effectText: 【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分の「ハチノス」1枚をレストにできる：自分のリーダーが特徴《黒ひげ海賊団》を持つ場合、このキャラは、このターン中、パワー+4000。【KO時】カード1枚を引く。

en.name: Catarina Devon
en.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may trash this Character: If your Leader has the {Blackbeard Pirates} type, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1 cost during this turn.[On K.O.] Draw 1 card.

jp.name: カタリーナ・デボン
jp.effectText: 【起動メイン】このキャラをトラッシュに置くことができる：自分のリーダーが特徴《黒ひげ海賊団》を持つ場合、相手のキャラ1枚までを、このターン中、コスト-1。【KO時】カード1枚を引く。

definition.name: Catarina Devon
definition.text: [Activate: Main] You may trash this Character: If your Leader has the {Blackbeard Pirates} type, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1 cost during this turn.[On K.O.] Draw 1 card.

en.name: Kuzan
en.effectText: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On K.O.] Play up to 1 {Blackbeard Pirates} type Character card with a cost of 5 or less from your trash rested.

jp.name: クザン
jp.effectText: 【ブロッカー】(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる)【KO時】自分のトラッシュからコスト5以下の特徴《黒ひげ海賊団》を持つキャラカード1枚までを、レストで登場させる。

definition.name: Kuzan
definition.text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On K.O.] Play up to 1 {Blackbeard Pirates} type Character card with a cost of 5 or less from your trash rested.

en.name: Sanjuan.Wolf
en.effectText: If your Leader has the {Blackbeard Pirates} type, this Character gains [Blocker] and +1 cost for every 4 cards in your trash.(After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On Play] Trash 1 card from your hand.

jp.name: サンファン・ウルフ
jp.effectText: 自分のリーダーが特徴《黒ひげ海賊団》を持つ場合、このキャラは【ブロッカー】を得て、自分のトラッシュ4枚につき、コスト+1。(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる)【登場時】自分の手札1枚を捨てる。

definition.name: Sanjuan.Wolf
definition.text: If your Leader has the {Blackbeard Pirates} type, this Character gains [Blocker] and +1 cost for every 4 cards in your trash.(After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On Play] Trash 1 card from your hand.

en.name: Marshall.D.Teach
en.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: K.O. up to 1 Character with a cost of 3 or less.[On K.O.] Add up to 1 black card from your trash to your hand.

jp.effectText: 【起動メイン】このキャラをレストにできる：コスト3以下のキャラ1枚までを、KOする。【KO時】自分のトラッシュから黒のカード1枚までを、手札に加える。
